metadata.title: Diving Chia | Scuba Diving & Snorkeling in Sardinia since 1996
metadata.description: Premium scuba diving and snorkeling experiences in Chia, South Sardinia. Small groups, tailor-made adventures since 1996. Book your Mediterranean experience.

hero.title: The sea of South Sardinia as few truly experience it
hero.subtitle: Diving, snorkeling and private outings among crystal clear water, wild coasts and Mediterranean sunsets.
hero.description: Small groups, attentive service and an authentic experience far from mass tourism.
hero.tags: DIVING · SNORKELING · TRY SCUBA · PRIVATE TOURS · SUNSET EXPERIENCE

since1996.title: SINCE 1996
since1996.subtitle: Real experience in the sea of South Sardinia

smallGroups.title: SMALL GROUPS
smallGroups.subtitle: More attention, more safety, less chaos

intro.title: Here the sea is not an excursion. It is an experience.
intro.description:
Wild cliffs, transparent water, reefs, rocky canyons and life-filled seabeds.

Every outing is organized in small groups to offer you an authentic, elegant experience completely different from standard tourism.

services.title: Choose your way to experience the sea
services.description: Whether you want to breathe underwater for the first time, explore spectacular seabeds or experience the sea in total relaxation, we will build the perfect experience for you.

tryScuba.name: Your first breath underwater
tryScuba.desc:
The silence.
The bubbles.
The light entering the blue.

Your first dive is not just something you do. It is something that stays with you.

We will guide you step by step in a safe, exciting and completely unique experience at sea.

guidedDives.name: Guided Dives in South Sardinia
guidedDives.desc:
We will take you to the most beautiful sites between Chia, Cala Piombo and Capo Teulada: rocky walls, reefs, canyons, passing caves and life-filled seabeds.

Each dive is chosen based on the best conditions of the day to offer you an authentic, safe and spectacular experience.

snorkeling.name: Transparent water, hidden coves and the most beautiful sea in South Sardinia
snorkeling.desc:
Explore coasts reachable only by sea, swim in crystal clear water and experience the Mediterranean in the most relaxing and authentic way possible.

Perfect for couples, families and those who want to experience the sea without scuba equipment.

privateTours.name: Your boat. Your sea. No crowds.
privateTours.desc:
A private boat, customized itinerary and the Mediterranean experienced with calm, freedom and atmosphere.

Snorkeling, relaxation, aperitif, sunset and the sea of South Sardinia experienced in the most exclusive way possible.

sunset.name: The most beautiful moment of the day begins at sea
sunset.desc:
Slow navigation, golden light, aperitif on board and the coast of South Sardinia changing color before your eyes.

Not just an outing. An experience to remember.

courses.name: Diving Courses
courses.desc:
From first experience to advanced levels.

Serious training, small groups and over 25 years of experience to learn to dive safely, consciously and relaxed.

whyUs.title: We are not a diving center for big numbers
whyUs.description:
We prefer fewer people on board and more quality in the experience.

That's why we work with small groups, customized programs and real attention to every customer.

since1996.label: SINCE 1996
since1996.desc: We have lived and worked in this sea for decades.

smallGroups.label: MAX 6 DIVERS PER GUIDE
smallGroups.desc: More safety, more attention, less chaos.

custom.label: CUSTOMIZED EXPERIENCES
custom.desc: Every outing is adapted to sea conditions.

safetyFirst.label: REAL SAFETY
safetyFirst.desc: Weather, wind and sea are evaluated every day.

local.label: LOCAL KNOWLEDGE
local.desc: We take you where it really matters.

whyUs.quote: It is not mass tourism. It is your experience, designed for you.
whyUs.quoteEn: This is not mass tourism. This is your experience, designed around you.

map.title: Where we operate
map.description:
Our activities take place between:

• Chia
• Pula
• Cala Piombo
• Capo Teulada

One of the most spectacular and authentic stretches of coast in Sardinia.

timeline.title: How a day with us unfolds

steps.title: Welcome and briefing
steps.desc:
We welcome you, prepare the equipment and organize everything calmly.

No rush. No chaos.

steps.title: Navigation
steps.desc: We set off along the coast towards the best spot of the day.

steps.title: Experience at sea
steps.desc: Diving, snorkeling, relaxation and the authentic sea of South Sardinia.

steps.title: Relax and return
steps.desc: We return with the feeling of having experienced something real.

safety.title: Safety comes first

testimonials.title: Real experiences
testimonials.description: People from all over the world choose Diving Center Chia to experience the sea of South Sardinia in the most authentic, safe and spectacular way possible.

items.quote: Abbiamo provato il Try Scuba in famiglia e è stata un'esperienza indimenticabile. I ragazzi del centro ci hanno accolto con professionalità e calore umano, spiegando ogni passaggio con pazienza. Mio figlio di 14 anni, che all'inizio era terrorizzato, è uscito dall'acqua con il sorriso più grande che gli abbia mai visto. Il mare di Chia è uno spettacolo, ma è il team che rende tutto magico. Consigliatissimo per chi cerca qualità e attenzione vera.
items.name: Marco & Giulia

items.quote: We had the most incredible diving experience with Diving Center Chia. As first-time divers, we were naturally anxious, but the instructors were patient, knowledgeable, and made us feel completely safe. The underwater landscapes around Chia and Capo Teulada are breathtaking — crystal clear water, vibrant marine life, and dramatic rock formations. What sets this place apart is the personal touch: small groups, no rushing, and genuine passion for the sea. This was the highlight of our Sardinia holiday and we will definitely return next summer!
items.name: Sarah T.

items.quote: Ho fatto diverse immersioni in tutta Italia, ma quelle a Chia con questo centro sono state le migliori di sempre. Conoscono ogni anfratto della costa, sanno esattamente dove andare in base alle condizioni del mare e ti fanno sentire sempre al sicuro. Abbiamo visto cernie giganti, murene, polpi e un fondale che sembrava un acquario naturale. La barca è comoda, l'attrezzatura top e l'atmosfera a bordo è quella di un gruppo di amici, non di un tour commerciale. Se cercate il mare autentico del Sud Sardegna, questo è il posto giusto.
items.name: Francesco

items.quote: Das Schnorcheln und der Sunset-Bootsausflug waren die absoluten Highlights unseres Urlaubs. Das Team hat uns zu versteckten Buchten gebracht, die wir niemals alleine gefunden hätten. Das Wasser war so klar, dass wir Fische und Korallen in jeder Tiefe sehen konnten. Beim Sonnenuntergang gab es einen leckeren Aperitif an Bord — romantisch, entspannt und perfekt organisiert. Man merkt sofort, dass hier Profis am Werk sind, die das Meer lieben und es ihren Gästen auf authentische Weise zeigen wollen. Absolut empfehlenswert!
items.name: Thomas & Anna

quotes.title: Every experience is tailor-made
quotes.note: No fixed price list. No standard price. Every outing is quoted individually to guarantee you the best quality-price ratio and a truly tailor-made experience.

booking.title: Tell us what you want to experience
booking.description: Tell us what your ideal experience is and we will reply within minutes via WhatsApp.
booking.name: Name
